{{Infobox group
| name = Sleepless leaders
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] suspects the cabal's possession of the [[Imperial relic]] is the will of the [[Sleepless leaders]] rather than the [[Great Ones]].}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
